name: peerit
description: A peer-to-peer Reddit that runs as a P2P site inside PearBrowser.

scripts.test: node test/bundle-closure.mjs && node test/smoke.mjs && node test/seal.mjs && node test/v2-key.mjs && node test/data-v2-write.mjs && node test/data-v2-read.mjs && node test/v2-pagination.mjs && node test/feed-windowing.mjs && node test/pow-identity-bind.mjs && node test/protocol-v3-content-id.mjs && node test/protocol-v3-target-binding.mjs && node test/seed-snapshot-compat.mjs && node test/seed-idempotency.mjs && node test/gossip.mjs && node test/bridge.mjs && node test/bridge-convergence.mjs && node test/local-bridge-proof.mjs && node test/runtime.mjs && node --test test/relay-backend.mjs && node test/relay-roster.mjs && node test/relay-roster-proof.mjs && node test/network-quorum.mjs && node test/release-verify.mjs && node test/deployed-web-mode.mjs && node test/writable-candidate-preflight.mjs && node test/writable-web-lurker.mjs && node test/release-workflow.mjs && node test/service-worker-atomic.mjs && node test/dht-adapter.mjs && node test/dht-build.mjs && node test/outbox-head.mjs && node test/relay-pool.mjs && node test/atomic-commit-client.mjs && node test/head-floor.mjs && node test/gossip-rollback-guards.mjs && node test/directory.mjs && node test/batch-ranges.mjs && node test/identity-export.mjs && node test/identity-key-at-rest.mjs && node test/identity-vault.mjs && node test/outbox-availability-proof.mjs && node test/blind-dealer.mjs && node test/disperse.mjs && node test/dispersal-app-wiring.mjs && node test/pearbrowser-dispersal-convergence.mjs && node test/gossip-v2.mjs && node test/social-graph.mjs && node test/notifications.mjs && node test/reputation.mjs && node test/lazy-pool-surface.mjs && node test/relay-availability-monitor.mjs && node test/instant-boot.mjs && node test/cache-poisoning.mjs && node test/lazy-identity.mjs && node test/identity-device-store.mjs && node test/identity-public-web-lifecycle.mjs && node test/writer-identity-race.mjs && node test/mod-ui.mjs && node test/v2-edit-delete.mjs && node test/ra-idb.mjs
